_meta.description:
Solution-level ERP-Wide AI Features umbrella. Per-feature Y/N (multi_select)
so vendors pick the subset of AI capabilities their solution provides.
All features Preferred per IMDA's Importance column.
_meta.source:
IMDA "ERP-Wide AI Features" template — caps 1.03 (LLM Layer) and 1.04
(Others) verbatim from the template provided 2026-06-03. 7 additional
feature definitions (AI Copilot, Anomaly Detection,
Predictive Forecasting, Agentic Workflow Orchestration, Intelligent
Document Processing, AI-Assisted Reconciliation, Recommendation Engine)
drafted by Claude in IMDA's short descriptive style. Descriptions
follow noun-phrase form without em-dashes or "for example" asides.
_meta.ships_when:
Multi-select shape + per-cap Y/N + Others gate-and-textarea shipped
2026-06-03 (commit pending). Excel export wiring still pending — see
TASKS.md.

umbrella_question: Does your solution incorporate any form of artificial intelligence across some or all of your ERP modules in this submission?

caps.name: AI-Enabled Large-Language Model Layer
caps.description:
An intelligent interface enabling the access and translation of
complex, structured ERP data via prompting through natural language.

caps.name: AI Copilot
caps.description:
An AI assistant that drafts and coordinates actions spanning multiple
ERP modules, with human approval gates between steps.

caps.name: AI Anomaly Detection
caps.description:
AI that flags unusual patterns by combining data across multiple
sub-ledgers (such as AP invoices cross-referenced with purchase
orders, vendor master records, and historical spend patterns).

caps.name: Predictive Forecasting
caps.description:
AI-driven forecasting that integrates inputs from multiple modules
(such as AR aging, sales pipeline, inventory levels, and AP
commitments) into unified projections like cash flow or demand.

caps.name: Agentic Workflow Orchestration
caps.description:
An AI agent that coordinates multi-step workflows spanning modules
(such as new-vendor onboarding or order-to-cash automation), with
human approval gates between steps.

caps.name: Other ERP-Wide AI Features
caps.description:
Please define any other ERP-wide AI capabilities your solution
provides that are not covered above.
